## 3dslibris 2.6.4

Four fixes: the "Clear Cache" button no longer shows stale text after use, CSS keyword font sizes now apply correctly in CSS classes, large books with many chapters in the same spine document now show a complete index, and CSS stylesheets are no longer silently dropped when a document links more than one.

See the full changelog below for details.

### Fixes

* #98: "Clear Cache" button no longer shows stale "cleared!" text when re-entering Settings after a cache clear
* #97: CSS keyword font sizes (`font-size: small`, `font-size: smaller`, `font-size: x-small`, etc.) in CSS classes now render at the correct size, even when "Respect publisher font size" is off; numeric values (`em`, `px`, `%`) remain gated behind that setting
* #99: Books where many TOC entries are fragment anchors within the same spine document (e.g. large anthologies) now generate a complete index; previously only one chapter per spine document was recorded, capping the index at the spine document count
* #76: Documents that link multiple CSS stylesheets now load all of them; previously only the first was used, so books with an Adobe `.xpgt` file (or any non-CSS file) listed before the actual `.css` had all CSS class rules silently ignored

---

## ❤️ Community Shoutouts

3dslibris wouldn't be the same without your support! This version is dedicated to:

* **Issue reports and testing:** Thanks to everyone who reported and followed up on #76, #97, #98, and #99.
* **Fueling the Code:** A special thank you to my **Ko-fi supporters**. Your donations help keep the project going and keep me caffeinated!

*Want to support the project? Consider leaving a ⭐ on GitHub or [buying me a coffee](https://ko-fi.com/rigle)!*

### Included assets

- `3dslibris.cia`
- `3dslibris-debug.cia`
- `3dslibris.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-debug.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-sdmc.zip` (runtime files only; pair it with the `.3dsx` asset for Homebrew Launcher installs)
- `3dslibris-source.tar.gz`
